section.name: Doxygen
section.p: Doxygen is configured by the root Doxyfile. It processes the Java source tree and the dedicated RMI contract com.bspq.e2.rmi.MovieTrakkRmi.
Run scripts/generate-doxygen.ps1 on Windows or scripts/generate-doxygen.sh on Unix systems after installing Doxygen and LaTeX. The generated PDF is copied to docs/doxygen/MovieTrakk-Doxygen.pdf.
GitHub Pages publishes the generated HTML under /doxygen/html/ and the PDF under /doxygen/MovieTrakk-Doxygen.pdf.
